Description: Compose styles from atomic utilities instead of custom CSS
Do: Use utility classes directly in JSX
Don't: Write custom CSS for every component
Code Good: className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-900 text-white"

Guideline: Use semantic color tokens via CSS vars
Description: Define semantic tokens in tailwind.config and reference them everywhere
Do: Extend theme with semantic color names

Description: Use class-based dark mode for programmatic control

Guideline: Avoid arbitrary values in hot paths
Description: Arbitrary values bypass Tailwind's design system
Stick to Tailwind's 4pt grid (1=4px 2=8px 4=16px)
Use class-variance-authority for multi-variant components
Don't: Giant ternary chains for variant styles
Code Good: const btn = cva('base', { variants: { intent: { primary: '...', danger: '...' } } })

Description: Use clsx + tailwind-merge via cn() to merge classes safely
Define colors as HSL channels for opacity modifier support
Don't: Include hsl() in the variable value

Description: Follow shadcn/ui naming for drop-in component compatibility
Do: Use standard tokens: background foreground card muted

Description: Write base styles for mobile then add md: lg: xl: overrides
Do: Start all layouts at mobile width
Don't: Write desktop layout then override down

Description: Cap content width on wide screens
Use grid for 2D layouts with named areas
Sidebar fixed width with flex-1 main content area
Use sticky positioning for headers; reserve space with padding-top
Do: sticky top-0 z-10 on header; pt-16 on main

Description: React 19 is fully hooks-based; no class components
Type all component props with interfaces
Do: Interface or type for every component
Code Good: interface CardProps { vendor: Vendor; onSelect: (id: string) => void }

Description: Each non-trivial component gets its own file
Do: One component per file with types co-located

Description: Use Radix UI (via shadcn) for dialogs/dropdowns/tooltips
Don't: Roll custom modal with div + useState

Description: Input wrapper components need forwardRef for form lib compatibility

Guideline: React Hook Form for all forms
Description: Use RHF for form state + validation; avoids re-renders per keystroke
Pair RHF with Zod resolver for type-safe runtime validation
Code Good: const schema = z.object({ email: z.string().email() }); useForm({ resolver: zodResolver(schema) })

Description: Show validation errors immediately below each field after blur
Don't: Toast-only errors or errors at page top

Description: Prevent double-submit by disabling button during async operations
Do: disabled + loading spinner on submit button

Description: Use TanStack Query for all API data; handles caching deduplication loading
Code Good: const { data, isLoading } = useQuery({ queryKey: ['vendors'], queryFn: fetchVendors })

Description: Use configured Axios instance (not fetch) for auth headers + error handling
Do: Single api.ts instance with JWT interceptor
Don't: axios() calls scattered with repeated config

Description: Update UI immediately before server confirms for perceived performance
Do: onMutate in useMutation for optimistic update
Don't: Wait for refetch after every mutation

Description: Always wrap charts in ResponsiveContainer for fluid width
Override default tooltip with custom component to match design system
Code Good: <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} /> where CustomTooltip uses design tokens
Code Bad: Default Recharts tooltip with clashing styles

Description: Use colorblind-safe palettes; never rely on color alone for data meaning
Do: Add shape/pattern differentiation or direct labels
Code Good: stroke='hsl(var(--chart-1))' + custom dot shape per series

Description: Show skeleton placeholder during chart data fetch; never blank axes
Do: Skeleton matching chart height; shimmer animation
Don't: Render empty axis frame while loading

Description: Cap rendered points; aggregate for dense time series
Do: Aggregate or sample beyond 200 points; provide drill-down

Description: Use createBrowserRouter with loader/action for co-located data fetching
Don't: useEffect fetch inside components for route data

Description: Wrap auth-required routes in a component that redirects to login
Do: ProtectedRoute component that checks auth and redirects
Don't: Check auth in every page component

Description: Always use React Router's navigate for SPA navigation
Lazy-load route-level components to reduce initial bundle
Don't: Import all pages at app root

Description: Memoize list item components rendered in loops
Don't: Inline component in map without memo

Description: Cache derived data (sorted lists filtered arrays computed scores)
Don't: Compute in render body on every pass

Description: Render only visible rows for lists exceeding 50 items
Don't: Map all items into DOM regardless of list length

Description: Audit bundle periodically with rollup-plugin-visualizer
Use native elements for their built-in accessibility semantics
Do: nav main aside article section h1-h6

Description: Move focus to main heading after navigation for screen readers
Do: Focus main h1 after route change
Don't: Leave focus on nav link after navigation

Description: Every icon-only button must have an accessible label
Trap focus inside open modals/dialogs; release on close
First focusable element on page jumps past navigation
Do: Visually hidden skip link as first element
Don't: No skip link (keyboard users must tab through nav)

Description: All text must meet WCAG AA contrast against its background
Do: Check contrast with design token pairs
Code Good: Use Tailwind Contrast Checker or axe DevTools

Description: Use Tailwind's transition/duration/ease utilities for simple state transitions
Use Framer Motion for enter/exit animations layout animations and gestures
Do: motion.div with variants for page/modal transitions
Code Good: <motion.div initial={{ opacity:0 }} animate={{ opacity:1 }} exit={{ opacity:0 }}>

Description: Disable or minimise animations when user has reduced motion enabled
Don't: Animate regardless of OS motion settings
Code Good: const shouldReduce = useReducedMotion(); const variants = shouldReduce ? {} : slideVariants

Description: Wrap conditional/list renders in AnimatePresence for exit animations
Do: AnimatePresence around conditionally rendered motion elements
Don't: Remove elements from DOM without exit animation

Description: Use Zustand for shared UI state (sidebar open auth user toast queue)
Code Good: const useStore = create((set) => ({ sidebarOpen: false, toggle: () => set(s => ...) }))

Description: Persist filter/sort/search state in URL params so links are shareable
Don't: useState for filters (breaks back button and sharing)

Description: Pass data more than 2 levels via context or Zustand
Do: Context or Zustand for deep data
Code Good: const useVendorStore = create(..); useVendorStore() in any child

Description: Use @testing-library/react with user-event for realistic tests
Do: userEvent over fireEvent; query by role/label not class
Don't: Select elements by className or test-id exclusively

Description: Wrap each major route section in an ErrorBoundary
Don't: No error boundaries (one crash takes down whole app)

Description: Centralise token refresh and logout in Axios response interceptor
